name: genome/adapter-list
description: List all LoRA adapters in the genome with sizes, domains, last-used timestamps, and cascade scores. Shows both on-disk (available) and loaded (active) adapters.

params.name: personaId
params.description: Filter adapters for a specific persona. If omitted, lists all adapters across all personas.

params.name: includeMetrics
params.description: Include cascade scores and training provenance (default: false)

results.name: activeCount
results.description: Number of adapters currently loaded in GPU memory

examples.description: List coding adapters for helper persona
